methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $11M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same-stage peers in AI & Software. Range: $250M - $2.4B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in AI & Compute

private.name: Liquid AI
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Series A), post-money $2.35B

private.name: Field AI
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Series A), post-money $2B

private.name: Twelve Labs
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Series A), post-money $250M

data.narrative:
Cortical Labs is a Series A-stage AI & Software company that has raised $11M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a peer set of 9 private companies and 1 public comparable (Palantir), with top private peers including Liquid AI, Field AI, Twelve Labs, OpenAI, and others operating in the same sector and stage.

Two methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis uses the $11M raised as a valuation proxy and applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical for Series A to next-stage progression, implying $22M. Peer-median analysis examines three same-sector, same-stage comparables: Liquid AI at $2.4B, Field AI at $2.0B, and Twelve Labs at $250M. The median of this peer set is $2.0B, establishing an upper anchor despite substantial dispersion (range: $250M–$2.4B).

The triangulated analysis yields a range of $19M to $2.3B, with a median of $1.0B across both methods. The wide range reflects fundamental uncertainty regarding Cortical Labs' relative positioning within the peer cohort. The stage-progression method suggests a conservative floor based on capital deployed. The peer-median approach indicates substantially higher potential if Cortical Labs' technology, market access, or traction resembles Liquid AI or Field AI rather than Twelve Labs. Resolution of this uncertainty requires clarity on revenue trajectory, technical defensibility, and competitive positioning relative to named peers.
